mechanics:
DOCUMENTED + an IMPORTANT honesty correction:
*** TRANSCRIPTION CATCH: an initial montage read 'WAKE THE BRIDE' / 'DO NOT WAKE THE BRIDE' as a dramatic boss taunt -> the WIDE re-crop shows it is actually PLAYER CHAT: '<...num of Hate> DO NOT WAKE THE BRIDGE.GU[ARDIAN]' + '<...e> dont even try getting omni[...]' = player banter (and the word is 'BRIDGE', NOT 'BRIDE'). NOT a boss taunt -> deliberately NOT recorded as one. ('Bridge Guardian' may be a real boss the players reference, but only a player-chat mention was captured -> flagged, not a taunt.) ***
(1) MAD JESTER boss taunt (verbatim, see bosses). (2) Heavy global EVENT FEED: Cube God / Hermit God / Mysterious Lord spawns + many 8/8 player deaths. (3) God-of-Luck 'You can use your Lucky Potion...' spam present (corroborates the built God of Luck). (4) LEGENDARY rarity drop overlays + an Oryx Sword. GENUINE ROTF.
uncertain: Short edited highlight -> attacks NOT cleanly traced (recorded honestly, not invented). 'Mad Jester' base-vs-custom unconfirmed. The lava-climax boss NAME not captured (not guessed). 'Bridge Guardian' is a PLAYER-CHAT mention only (the 'BRIDE'->'BRIDGE.GU' fix), NOT a verified boss/taunt. Some feed lines partial.
confidence: MEDIUM. GENUINE ROTF. One SOLID verbatim taunt (Mad Jester, wide-re-crop-read). Otherwise base-game event feed + an unidentified LEGENDARY-drop lava boss (attack not isolated). KEY value beyond the Mad Jester line = the honest CATCH that 'WAKE THE BRIDE' was a MISREAD of player chat 'DO NOT WAKE THE BRIDGE.GU[ARDIAN]' -> a fabrication avoided (directly serves the 'how much fake stuff is in our build' concern). Best follow-up: a clean single-boss clip of the lava-arena boss + confirm whether a 'Bridge Guardian' boss exists.
